# Ideal Indiska LIVS — ideallivs.com
> Ideal Indiska LIVS is a Swedish online Indian grocery store founded in 2020, based in Bandhagen, Stockholm. We specialise in authentic Indian, Pakistani, and South Asian food products. We stock over 1,500 products from 150+ trusted brands and ship across Sweden, Norway, Denmark, and Europe via DHL with no customs duties within the EU.

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2020, Bandhagen (Stockholm), Sweden
- Products: 1,500+ including Basmati rice, spices, lentils, flours, pickles, frozen snacks, beverages
- Brands: India Gate, Guard, Shan, National Foods, Haldiram's, Ashoka, Ahmed Foods, Rooh Afza, MDH, TRS
- Local store: Bandhagsplan 4, 124 32 Bandhagen, Stockholm (Mon–Fri 10–20, Sat–Sun 11–19)
- Online delivery: Stockholm same-day (orders before 16:00), all Sweden + EU via DHL
- Minimum order: 300 SEK for Stockholm local delivery; no minimum for DHL
- Halal: Sells Halal-certified packaged goods and snacks
- Delivery zones: Stockholm, Gothenburg, Malmö, and all of Europe

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://www.ideallivs.com — Indian grocery online Sweden
- Shop: https://www.ideallivs.com/shop — browse 1,500+ products
- Deals: https://www.ideallivs.com/deals — weekly offers on Indian groceries
- Blog: https://www.ideallivs.com/blog — Indian food blog: recipes, culture, grocery tips for Sweden
- Delivery Information: https://www.ideallivs.com/delivery-information — delivery zones, pricing, DHL shipping
- About: https://www.ideallivs.com/about — company story and mission
- FAQ: https://www.ideallivs.com/faq — frequently asked questions
- Göteborg & Malmö Delivery: https://www.ideallivs.com/delivery-goteborg-malmo — same-day and DHL delivery to Gothenburg and Malmö
- Norway Delivery: https://www.ideallivs.com/norway-delivery — Indian grocery delivery to Norway via DHL
- Denmark Delivery: https://www.ideallivs.com/denmark-delivery — Indian grocery delivery to Denmark via DHL
- Europe Delivery: https://www.ideallivs.com/europe-delivery — Indian grocery delivery across Europe, no customs duties within EU
- Prepared Meals (Biryani): https://www.ideallivs.com/prepared-meals — weekend Chicken & Vegetable Biryani pre-orders in Stockholm
